name: Crown Holdings, Inc.
description: Crown Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and sells packaging products and equipment for consumer goods and industrial products in the Americas, Europe, and the Asia Pacific. The company offers aluminum beverage cans and ends, food cans and ends, aerosol cans and ends, metal closures, and specialty packaging, as well as transit packaging products, including industrial strapping, protective packaging, and stretch film. It serves various markets, including beverage, food, aerosol, promotional, and transit packaging.
